title: SnapLogic Pipeline Execution
description: Schema for SnapLogic pipeline execution objects returned by the Runtime APIs

ruuid.description: Runtime UUID uniquely identifying the pipeline execution

status.description: Current status of the pipeline execution

pipeline_path.description: Full path to the pipeline in the SnapLogic project hierarchy

start_time.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the execution started

end_time.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the execution ended (null if still running)

error_message.description: Error message if the execution failed

user_name.description: SnapLogic username of the user who triggered the execution

org.description: SnapLogic organization the execution belongs to

label.description: Display label for the pipeline execution
